data.current_description: Get list of countries with available leagues.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of countries that have available football leagues. Supports filtering by search term, league ID, or code. Returns country information including name, code, and flag. Use this endpoint to discover which countries are covered by the API.
data.reasoning: While the description mentions filtering is possible (3 parameters), it doesn't specify what those parameters are or how to use them. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented and added details about available filter options and return value to improve AI agent usability.

data.current_description: Get league standings/tables. At least season and league are required.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve league standings/tables showing team rankings, points, wins, losses, and other statistics. Requires at least season and league parameters. Use this endpoint to get current league rankings or historical standings.

data.current_description: Get pre-match betting odds for fixtures.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve pre-match betting odds from multiple bookmakers for specified fixtures. Supports filtering by fixture ID, league, season, and bookmaker. Returns odds data including match result odds (1X2), over/under, handicap, and other betting markets. Useful for comparing odds across bookmakers and analyzing betting opportunities.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity. The operation supports 7 parameters but current description doesn't explain what they filter by.
